_meta.purpose: Trust-building sentences. Used in middle of review. Makes the reader believe the experience was real.
rules: Reference the doctor or staff naturally
Mention listening, patience, explanation — real patient concerns
Vary between staff praise and process praise

5star: The doctor actually listens to what you say instead of rushing you out.
He explained everything so clearly, didn't make me feel confused at all.
The staff is very polite and never made me feel rushed.
Doctor sahab takes time with each patient which is rare these days.
You can tell the doctor genuinely cares about getting you better.
The consultation was thorough and he asked the right questions.
Unlike other places, they don't just hand you medicines without explanation.
The doctor remembered my case even on my second visit which was impressive.
Very patient with all my questions, never felt like a burden.
The medicines were explained properly — what to take, when, and why.
Felt like the doctor was treating me as a person not just a patient number.
Even my follow up questions over phone were answered properly.
The clinic has a very calm and clean environment which helps.
The reception staff is also very helpful and cooperative.
Treatment plan was explained clearly without any confusion.
Dr. Verma was the first doctor who gave me relief from the very first dose.
He didn t just give medicines — he explained exactly what was happening and why it would work.
What surprised me most was that he was confident from day one. No ifs or buts.
I had visited doctors in Delhi, Mumbai, and even abroad. Dr. Verma solved it right here in Lucknow.
He has seen thousands of stone cases. That experience shows immediately when he speaks.
Dr. Verma told me the stone would pass within weeks without surgery. It did.
The confidence and knowledge Dr. Verma has about difficult cases is on another level.
Unlike other doctors who were vague, Dr. Verma told me exactly what to expect and when.
4star: The doctor is knowledgeable and the consultation was good.
Staff is cooperative and the clinic is well maintained.
The doctor explained the treatment plan properly.
Good listening from the doctor side.
Clinic environment is clean and comfortable.
Staff was polite throughout my visit.
Doctor gave proper time during consultation.
Reasonable explanation given for the medicines prescribed.
3star: The doctor listened to my problem.
The clinic was okay in terms of cleanliness.
